meaning: n.婊炲悗浣滅敤,[鐗纾佹粸鐜拌薄
examples: The substance is then said to exhibit hysteresis .
The exact shape of the hysteresis curve is very sensitive to it.
There is hysteresis between the sorption and desorption curves.
Hysteresis has historically been a bigger threat in the euro area than in America or Britain.
So the next line of defence against hysteresis is to keep the jobless in the labour force, actively looking for work.
